## RFC / Issue

- RFC: `docs/rfcs/NNNN-title.md`
- Closes #

## What changed

2-3 sentence summary. Technical detail lives in the diff.

## Checklist against the RFC's acceptance criteria

Copy the relevant acceptance criteria from the RFC (not from the issue —
the RFC is the source of truth) and check off what this PR covers. If any
criterion isn't covered by this PR, say explicitly why (e.g. "covered in
PR #123").

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Out of scope for this PR

What was deliberately left out (inherited from the RFC's "non-goals"
section, or decided during implementation).

## How to test

Manual steps or the relevant automated test command.

## Automated review

Before human review, run the `pr-review` skill to check the diff against
the RFC and paste the result below (optional, but recommended for large
PRs or RFCs with many acceptance criteria).
